calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Louis Caretti for and with Thomas Gill. Dryden Liddle of Law Finance Group.

Mr. Liddle explained that Law Finance was Inheritance Now, that the Beneficiary entered into a loan agreement in 2010, that he provided business name change certificates as well as a business license and that distribution will be made payable to Law Finance Group. The Court approved the Petition for Final Distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Continued To Aug-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
